subject: bulldog readiness update for Brisbane | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-4429
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of bulldog work in Brisbane. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-4429. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: drop-bears, delivery.
